h6777d914g64b8g4e10g8f52g528cd352bbb1: Any goblin comes near me now, and they'll regret it. I feel amazing.

h4eb5459dg2368g4761g91e6ge794dbd4dd83: To her credit, it worked. I'm as strong as a bugbear. And fearless.
h459f4f1agd533g47c5gb345gce455d1f5676: Course she also warned of side effects. Should have listened. Now I'm stuck guarding crates.
